title: Agent Identity
description: Schema for knowledge/personal/agent-identity.json — the Agent's formal identity for A2A collaboration.

agent_id.description: Formal Agent ID (e.g., KYBERION-PRIME). Used for A2A communication and immutable evidence.

role.description: Agent's designated role (e.g., Ecosystem Architect / Senior Partner).

owner.description: Name of the Sovereign who owns this agent.
